question: [File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/util/DatabaseWaiter.java -> Scope: Critical: Network not being able to confirm new transactions (total network shutdown)'] [Function: waitForDatabase()] Can an unprivileged external user flood the database port with TCP connections before the mirror node restarts, causing every DriverManager.getConnection() attempt inside the retry loop to fail for the full timeout duration, so the IllegalStateException is thrown and the application never starts, resulting in total network shutdown?
